name: Ryze
tagline: AI tool for managing Google and Meta advertising campaigns
description: Ryze built AI-powered ad management, but when Claude and Manus AI shipped competing features, their deal close rate dropped from 70% to 20% overnight.
story: Ryze was an early-stage AI startup that built tools for managing Google and Meta advertising campaigns using artificial intelligence. The product automated bid optimization, audience targeting, and ad creative generation. For a time, the 70% deal close rate suggested strong product-market fit. Then Anthropic's Claude and Manus AI released features that directly competed with Ryze's core offering — AI-powered ad campaign management built into general-purpose AI assistants. Ryze's close rate plummeted from 70% to 20% seemingly overnight. The startup couldn't compete with AI platforms that offered ad management as one feature among many, rather than a standalone product. Ryze shut down in 2025, a clean example of platform absorption in real time.
